ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited (liked) */,
  "media_count" INTEGER /* Number of media attachments in the tweet */,
  "url_count" INTEGER /* Number of URLs in the tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being replied to */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of tweet (e.g., original, retweet, reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, content creator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is verified */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "cover_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's cover picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_media" (
  "media_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each media attachment */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the media is attached to */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media was uploaded */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the media in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the media in pixels */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "url_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the URL is included in */,
  "url" TEXT /* Full URL */,
  "url_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "url_title" TEXT /* Title of the URL content */,
  "url_description" TEXT /* Description of the URL content */,
  "url_image" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the URL content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is an influencer */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet with engagement metrics */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets for the tweet */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each analytics metric */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user with analytics metrics */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the user */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "tweets" INTEGER /* Number of tweets posted by the user */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate for the user's tweets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
